faqs.q: What if my fetish is really specific?
faqs.a: Kindred has over 200 interest tags and you can write in any more. {location} members search by tag every day, so specific doesn't mean invisible.

faqs.q: I'm new and a bit nervous. Is that OK?
faqs.a: Very. A big share of {location}'s fetish community identifies as curious or new. Look for the beginner-friendly badge.
Yes. Every {location} member completes photo verification before sending messages. Fake profiles get removed within 24 hours of being reported.
Zero tolerance. Shaming another member in chat or comments gets a warning on first offence and a permanent ban on the second. We mean it.

faqs.q: Can I keep my identity private?
faqs.a: Yes. Your legal name is never shown. You control which photos are public and which are request-only.
Free to join and message verified members. Premium adds unlimited filters, galleries, and read receipts.
